title: Singapore, South Korea to work towards upgrading free trade agreement
description: Cooperation in areas such as artificial intelligence, civil nuclear energy and intellectual property is also on the cards after both sides concluded several memorandums of understanding.
content:
SINGAPORE: Singapore and South Korea on Monday (Mar 2) announced plans to upgrade the free trade agreement between both countries.

title: Study finds AI tools are making people work more, many skipping breaks
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) is getting better at coding. However, this has seemingly not reduced the burden for human workers. Instead, coders are now using AI, and working even more.
content: When vibe coding first became a thing over a year ago, it was seen as something that could help humans reduce their work stress. No longer would you need to code manually for hours – the AI will simply do it for you. And while coding agents like Clau... [2289 chars]

title: Tech billionaire Jack Dorsey cuts half of his Afterpay workforce in Australia as AI takes over - just days after splurging on lavish company trip
description: The parent company of 'buy-now-pay-later' giant Afterpay has culled almost half of its Australian workforce, blaming the rise of artificial intelligence.
content:
The parent company of 'buy-now-pay-later' giant Afterpay has sacked half of its Australian staff just two days after taking them on a boujee company retreat, which one worker had just lauded as showing 'the culture was better than ever'.
Around 200 s... [3278 chars]

title: Telekom Introduces AI Assistant to Mobile Network
description: Deutsche Telekom aims to offer access to an artificial intelligence voice assistant during phone calls. This service will be launched soon, said Telekom Chief Technology Officer Abdu Mudesir at the...
content: BONN/BARCELONA (dpa-AFX) - Deutsche Telekom aims to offer access to an artificial intelligence (AI) voice assistant during phone calls. This service will be launched "soon," said Telekom Chief Technology Officer Abdu Mudesir at the opening of the Mob... [1275 chars]

title: AI being increasingly mentioned in children’s stories
description: Children are increasingly mentioning artificial intelligence (AI) in their stories, Oxford University Press research has found.
content:
Mentions of AI increased 50 per cent from the year before in more than 46,500 stories that children aged five to 11 submitted to a competition in 2025.
Analysis by Oxford University Press of stories submitted to the BBC 500 Words competition found th... [2976 chars]

title: South Korea and Singapore Forge Stronger Ties in AI and Nuclear Energy
description: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung and Singaporean Prime Minister Lawrence Wong held a summit to boost cooperation in artificial intelligence and nuclear energy. They announced negotiations to upgrade the 2006 free trade agreement and signed MOUs on small modular reactors, AI, and space technologies.
content:
South Korean President Lee Jae Myung and Singapore Prime Minister Lawrence Wong convened for a landmark summit to enhance cooperation in artificial intelligence and nuclear energy during Lee's state visit to Singapore.

title: SEBI removes 1.2 lakh misleading finfluencer posts, deploys AI ‘Sudarshan’: Chairman
description: The Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) has removed more than 1.2 lakh misleading social media posts by unregistered financial influencers and is leveraging artificial intelligence (AI) tools to track violations in the digital space, Chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey said.

title: Australia says it may go after app stores, search engines in AI age crackdown
description: Australia’s internet regulator said it may push search engines ​and app stores to block artificial intelligence services that fail to verify user ages after a Reuters review
content: Australia’s internet regulator said it may push search engines ​and app stores to block artificial intelligence services that fail to verify user ages after a Reuters review found more than half had not made ‌public any steps to comply by a deadline ... [4771 chars]

title: 16 social media ban, Australia turns focus to ChatGPT and other AI platforms
description: Tech News News: After banning use of social media for children below 16 years of age, Australia may be preparing to tighten rules on artificial intelligence platforms.
